title: Title page menu visibility
author: marenamat
body: Now when the thumbnail page scrolls down, the controls and metadata disappear. I want them fixed.

title: Display descriptions on the thumbnail page
author: marenamat
body: Display truncated descriptions below the images on the thumbnail page. Display full descriptions on hover.

title: Image view recalculation
author: marenamat
body: The views should be generated only once and aggressively cached, e.g. by keeping a SHA hash of the original file and checking against that. After editing by GIMP, regenerating the views is needed.

title: ESC should return to the main album page
author: marenamat
body: in the editor, ESC does not work for whatever reason

title: Deletion: show in the single view, allow undelete
author: marenamat
body: Show that the photo is deleted in the single-* view. Add undelete button there.

title: Enter-to-edit weird behavior
author: marenamat
body: The enter-to-edit-description should cycle through the language variants (cs and en). Also when manually clicking the description, it never saves.

title: move the GIMP button elsewhere
author: marenamat
body: it looks weird in the log window
